name: Social Leverage Acquisition Corp I Redeemable warrants each whole warrant exercisable for one share of Class A common stock at an exercise price of $11.50
summary: Social Leverage Acquisition Corp I Redeemable warrants each whole warrant exercisable for one share of Class A common stock at an exercise price of $11.50 entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock at a specified price. These warrants are typically issued as part of a unit offering. The company is a blank check company that seeks to merge with another company.
